title: Alcohol & Sleep: The Myth of the Nightcap
description: Deep dive into how alcohol disrupts sleep cycles — REM suppression, fragmented architecture, rebound insomnia — and why the cultural "nightcap" idea is counterproductive. Built around a single sleep-study graph rendered in the brand's electric-blue palette.
hook: That glass of wine isn't helping you sleep. Here's what it's actually doing.
keyMessage: Alcohol fragments your sleep architecture even at small doses.
